name: Bids with alternates and unit prices
description: Extract data from bids that include alternate pricing, unit prices, and allowances in addition to base bid amounts

inputs.user_prompt: Tabulate these MEP bids. They include alternates and unit prices that I need to compare.

expected_behavior: Extracts base bid amounts from all bidders
Identifies and extracts alternates (add/deduct) with correct sign and description
Captures unit prices with their units preserved exactly (e.g., $/SF, $/LF)
Extracts allowances included in each bid
Comparison Summary tab includes alternate pricing rows aligned across bidders
Per-bidder tabs show full breakdown of alternates, unit prices, and allowances
ground_truth_notes: Manually extracted all pricing from each bid: base, alternates (with add/deduct designation), unit prices (with units), allowances.

base_bid_accuracy.description: Base bid amounts match ground truth

alternate_accuracy.description: Alternate names, amounts, and add/deduct signs correctly captured

unit_price_accuracy.description: Unit prices captured with correct values and units

cross_bidder_alignment.description: Same-name alternates aligned in the Comparison Summary across bidders

format.description: Valid xlsx with all required tabs and alternate rows in summary
